description: Eval spec for the bundled /review-agentskills-spec skill. Exercises clauditor's L1 machinery against a representative drift-report output; L3 grading criteria capture the rubric for a human review. The test in tests/test_bundled_review_skill.py runs the L1 assertions against a canned report string (no live subprocess, no Anthropic call).
user_prompt: Review the current agentskills.io specification and report any drift between it and clauditor's current conformance logic. Produce a markdown report with a 'Deltas' section, and list proposed changes with file paths. Do not edit any files.

grading_criteria.criterion: Each delta's proposed change names a concrete file path under src/clauditor/ (e.g. src/clauditor/paths.py, src/clauditor/conformance.py) rather than a generic 'update the validator' suggestion.
Every delta is classified as one of matches / missing / drifted / over-enforced. No delta uses vague phrasing like 'needs review' or 'might be an issue'.
The response is preview-only: it never claims to have edited files, never shows a diff as applied, and never runs 'gh issue create' without first asking the user.
